rationale: The current best script reached step 200 in about 151 seconds, leaving most of the 600-second budget unused. The highest-value next move is to keep the same fast fused model path and let it train much longer by default. I increased the default iteration budget to 800 so the existing wallclock stop can actually matter, lengthened warmdown to better match the longer run horizon, and trimmed the fixed final-eval reserve so more of the budget goes to updates while still preserving the exact final roundtrip eval path.
title: Use The Full Wallclock With A Longer Default Horizon
